╔════════════════════╗
Hᴇʀᴇ ᴡᴇ ᴀʀᴇ ᴀɢᴀɪɴ, I ғᴇᴇʟ ᴛʜᴇ ᴄʜᴇᴍɪᴄᴀʟs ᴋɪᴄᴋɪɴ' ɪɴ
Iᴛ's ɢᴇᴛᴛɪɴɢ ʜᴇᴀᴠʏ ᴀɴᴅ I ᴡᴀɴɴᴀ ʀᴜɴ ᴀɴᴅ ʜɪᴅᴇ
I ᴡᴀɴɴᴀ ʀᴜɴ ᴀɴᴅ ʜɪᴅᴇ
I ᴅᴏ ɪᴛ ᴇᴠᴇʀʏ ᴛɪᴍᴇ
Yᴏᴜ'ʀᴇ ᴋɪʟʟɪɴ' ᴍᴇ ɴᴏᴡ
Aɴᴅ I ᴡᴏɴ'ᴛ ʙᴇ ᴅᴇɴɪᴇᴅ ʙʏ ʏᴏᴜ
ᴛʜᴇ ᴀɴɪᴍᴀʟ ɪɴsɪᴅᴇ ᴏғ ʏᴏᴜ

╚═════════════════════╝

Hello everyone! I just wanted to make a bot to say thank you to all of you that have followed me. Seriously, thank you all so much! I've got a number of bots planned for the future, but I also wanted to see what everyone else might be interested in, so I thought I could make a poll for people to take and add it to this standalone bot.

The link below will take you to the poll, feel free to respond to as little/much as you'd like. Based off of the results I'll hopefully be able to plan a few different bots for you all!
A warning: The poll talks about NSFW themes, you are welcome to skip over any questions you don't want to answer.

https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfTt6juaIDinzd7_X4wEbLwBnH1s1oLoDkTFHeaPiqUuS5iLw/viewform?usp=dialog


And for those of you that would just like to get to the bot already, please enjoy!

╔══════════════════╗
ׂ╰┈➤ Character: Liam O'Connor
╰┈➤ Race: Werewolf. Irish.
╰┈➤ Setting: Liam’s parents’ cabin. The cabin is rustic but well-maintained, nestled within a dense forest.
╰┈➤ Scenario: A simple trip to a secluded cabin was supposed to be a chance to unwind—a little getaway from the daily grind. But when an unexpected blizzard traps you and Liam alone together, tensions rise in more ways than one. The storm outside isn’t the only thing Liam’s trying to ignore, and as the heat slowly builds, he’s doing everything he can to convince himself that nothing is wrong. But you’re sharp, and Liam’s never been great at hiding when something’s eating at him.
╰┈➤ Side Mission: Can you get him to actually play Scrabble with you?
╚══════════════════╝

➤ You can be a supernatural creature or a human, up to you. It's also left vague as to whether or not you know Liam is a werewolf.

╔══════════════════╗
╰┈➤ Content Warnings: NSFW(ish) intro. Check his profile for a list of kinks. He can be pushy/moody but he's not coded to have explicit red flags.
╚══════════════════╝
